message:
bd-2wds9: Verify http/h2/connection.rs audit (SOUND)

Stale agent a61bf14 flagged CRITICAL "undefined methods" compile error.

Verification: FALSE POSITIVE

1. CRITICAL (cast_unsigned/cast_signed undefined): FALSE POSITIVE
   - cargo check passes - code compiles successfully
   - These are stable Rust 1.79+ integer methods
   - Agent didn't recognize standard library features

2. HIGH (concurrency in window updates): FALSE POSITIVE
   - Connection uses &mut self - single-owner pattern
   - Not designed for concurrent access

3. Other findings: Phase 0 incomplete or minor design concerns

The code compiles and the "critical compile error" doesn't exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
